title: cenchrus unisetus
intro: Cenchrus unisetus, also known as the 'Six-angled beard grass' or 'Bhadrak', is a type of plant belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Cenchrus unisetus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, to utilize its medicinal properties effectively.
